overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic Arasaka corporate facility. The camera moves from a dark teal-lit corridor with holographic displays into a bright security lobby with guards at their stations, featuring neon lighting and high-end cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic corporate corridor with holographic displays

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dark corridor toward a stairway at the end

entered.detail: large translucent digital display showing blue interface graphics on the right wall
long linear fluorescent lights hanging from the dark ceiling
short flight of stairs at the end of the corridor leading upward

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow, dark corridor illuminated by teal neon lights and a large holographic display wall on the right. The space is empty and quiet, with reflective marble floors and a stairway visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka corporate security lobby with reception desk

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open corporate lobby with high ceilings
ambient lighting brightens significantly as camera enters the main lobby area

agents.ego_description: turns left out of the corridor and approaches the Arasaka security desk

notable_agents.action: security guard sitting at the reception desk working on a computer terminal

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying '2078' and a mech image visible through the lobby entrance
long curved desk with multiple computer stations and metallic finish
illuminated corporate logo mounted on the wall behind the security desk

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the corridor into a spacious, well-lit lobby. A large digital billboard is visible in the background while the camera approaches the Arasaka security desk where a guard is seated. The lighting shifts from dark teal to warm white as the space opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka security checkpoint with multiple guard stations

events.description: camera slows slightly while passing the first security guard station

agents.ego_description: moving along the security desk observing multiple guards at their computer stations

notable_agents.action: security guard typing at computer terminal, wearing Arasaka uniform with cap
second security guard visible further down the desk, working at his station

entered.detail: large glass windows showing the neon-lit cityscape outside with passing vehicles

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the curved security desk, passing by guards working at their terminals. The Arasaka logo remains visible on the left wall while large windows reveal the cyberpunk city outside. The scene maintains a sterile, corporate atmosphere with uniformed personnel focused on their tasks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, dimly lit corporate artery into a vast, sterile security hub. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor defined by dark teal neon lights and a large holographic display wall reflecting off polished marble floors. As the camera reaches the end of the passage, the space abruptly opens into a spacious lobby where the lighting shifts from moody teal to a bright, warm white. The movement then flows along a curved security desk, passing uniformed guards at their terminals while the Arasaka logo remains visible on the wall. Finally, the perspective expands toward large windows that reveal the sprawling cyberpunk city outside, completing the transition from an enclosed interior to an open corporate vista.
